---
title: "The Rev. and Hon. Graham Colborne"
---

## The Rev. and Hon. Graham Colborne

**Dates:** (10 October 1825-30 Oct 1913)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

He married (18 Sept 1890) Florence Susanna Porter (d. 23 Jan 1901).  He was  Rector of Dittisham, Devon 1853-1913 [PB 1914]

### Letters

- Letter from February 28, 1869
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from [Late August 1868]
- Letter from September 10, 1858.
- Letter from October 3. [1857]
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857
- Letter from 8th March 1854
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]
- Letter from [?January 1837]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
